## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `shellcheck -x scripts/*.sh scripts/lib/*.sh` locally
- [ ] I tested `--dry-run` with my changes
- [ ] I tested a real install on at least one platform
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or flags changed
